title: Pairing, System Reasoning, Debugging, and Project Defense · Claim Audit: Project Defense
summary: A candidate treats collaboration as performance theater, accepts false premises, over-designs an abstract system, and describes a team project as entirely personal work. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the project defense increment in multi-format technical defense packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Defend personal contribution, team decisions, failures, accessibility, security, testing, operations, outcomes, assistance, and non-claims with inspectable evidence.
Compare feasible alternatives against explicit scenarios, limits, evidence, and revision triggers instead of claiming one best architecture.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Project Defense · Theory Project Defense
steps.instruction:
theory case — A candidate dominates a pair task, guesses at a bug, draws fashionable architecture, and claims a team project without separating personal work. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Project Defense contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Project Defense · Theory Project Defense.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for defend personal contribution, team decisions, failures, accessibility, security, testing, operations, outcomes, assistance, and non-claims with inspectable evidence. For Predict Project Defense · Theory Project Defense, keep Project Defense connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A candidate dominates a pair task, guesses at a bug, draws fashionable architecture, and claims a team project without separating personal work. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Project Defense condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: O*NET Software Developers Occupation Report — Controls task, work-activity, skill, knowledge, work-style, and technology evidence used to decompose roles rather than chase job-title labels.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Project Defense while producing multi-format technical defense packet.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A candidate dominates a pair task, guesses at a bug, draws fashionable architecture, and claims a team project without separating personal work. The worked example variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Defend personal contribution, team decisions, failures, accessibility, security, testing, operations, outcomes, assistance, and non-claims with inspectable evidence. A defensible solution applies Project Defense, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to multi-format technical defense packet.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-project-defense — Defend personal contribution, team decisions, failures, accessibility, security, testing, operations, outcomes, assistance, and non-claims with inspectable evidence.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-5
focus: career-project-defense
decision-evidence: Defend personal contribution, team decisions, failures, accessibility, security, testing, operations, outcomes, assistance, and non-claims with inspectable evidence.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Speaking in “we” avoids the need to identify personal contribution. This fails the Project Defense contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: O*NET Software Developers Occupation Report (O*NET current occupation data reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls task, work-activity, skill, knowledge, work-style, and technology evidence used to decompose roles rather than chase job-title labels.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend personal contribution, team decisions, failures, accessibility, security, testing, operations, outcomes, assistance, and non-claims with inspectable evidence.
